steps.title: Find the plural subject
steps.content: The subject is The trailblazing accomplishments of Goldin. The head noun is accomplishments, which is plural; the descriptive phrase about Goldin's Nobel Prize does not change the subject.

steps.title: Use plural agreement
steps.content: Choice A, Choice C, and Choice D are singular verb forms. The plural subject needs the plural present-tense verb. The answer is B.
